points.text: Practice good personal hygiene, including regular hand washing with soap and water.
Wear a face mask in public and when in close contact with others.
Maintain physical or social distancing to reduce transmission risk.
Ensure proper ventilation of indoor spaces to decrease virus spread.
Stay home if you are diagnosed with COVID-19 or believe you may be infected.
Cover coughs and sneezes with a tissue or your elbow to prevent spreading droplets.
Avoid sharing personal household items to minimize risk of transmission.
Stay up to date on COVID-19 vaccinations to enhance protection.
Keep unwashed hands away from your face to prevent infection.
Quarantine if exposed to someone with COVID-19 to prevent spread.
Stay up to date on your COVID-19 vaccine to prevent serious illness.
Ensure good indoor airflow to help prevent the spread of the virus.
Practice physical distancing to reduce the risk of transmission.
Wear a mask in appropriate settings to protect yourself and others.
Maintain good hygiene by washing hands frequently with soap and water.
Avoid close contact with anyone who is sick or has symptoms.
Cover your coughs and sneezes to prevent spreading the virus.
Test for COVID-19 if you have symptoms or after exposure to the virus.
Avoid crowded places and practice physical distancing of at least 1 metre.
Wear a mask in public places where physical distancing is not possible.
Wash your hands frequently with soap and water or an alcohol-based hand rub.
Keep indoor spaces well ventilated to reduce virus spread.
Seek medical care early if experiencing COVID-19 symptoms.
Stay informed about local COVID-19 guidance and recommendations.
Get vaccinated to help reduce the spread of the virus.
Regularly clean and disinfect surfaces you frequently touch.
